Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "STARRACE-6000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Star Race.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC program to provide instructions before the main game loads. However, as the main game BASIC program overwrites the intro when loaded, the following steps were taken to retain the intro:
1. The intro program from $0801 - $14C6 was dumped when run and modified as follows: a) The RUN 4000 statement on line number 9 was changed to RUN 2000 (this allows the main game to start on the title screen instead of in-game) b) Line number 190 was replaced with a SYS 27904 statement so that the intro jumps to a new routine added at $6D00 when finished c) Line numbers 195 and 200 were removed 2. A breakpoint at $A7AE was set to break when the main game had loaded 3. The memory range between $6000-$BFFF was zeroed out to remove an unecessary repeating memory block 4. The modified BASIC intro was then placed at the free memory at $6101 and relinked with the BASIC subroutine at $A533 5. A routine was added at $6000 which sets the correct VICII and BASIC pointer values before executing the BASIC RUN command to start the intro program 6. This routine also disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $E1 at $0328 7. A routine was added at $6D00 which sets the correct VICII and BASIC pointer values before executing the BASIC RUN command to start the main game
